zh.title: 比特币/美元技术分析：短期震荡偏空，关键支撑待守
zh.content:
当前比特币价格围绕68660美元附近震荡，较20日均线69559美元明显偏低，显示短期仍存在下行压力。价格在24小时内微幅下跌0.22%，高低点区间窄，反映市场多空力量暂时均衡，短期趋势偏弱。  

MACD指标为-430.16且未有明确信号线显示，暗示空方占优，但动能衰减，价格可能在支撑区获得一定支撑。RSI缺失使超买超卖判断受限，但结合均线位置，可推测当前市场尚未进入极端超卖状态。  

关键支撑位位于68575美元附近，若跌破可能触发进一步回调；阻力位则在69559美元20日均线附近，突破需伴随成交量放大。短线操作上，可关注支撑反弹机会，控制仓位，避免追高。  

综合来看，短期比特币仍呈震荡偏空格局，建议保守交易者等待明确反转信号或支撑确认后入场。激进操作可尝试低位小幅买入，但需严格设置止损在68550美元以下，以防快速下破造成损失。

en.title: Bitcoin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Bitcoin is currently navigating a tight range near $68,660, showing subtle bearish pressure after failing to sustain a move above $68,800. Price action suggests a short-term consolidation phase, with the market testing the lower bound near $68,575. While momentum remains relatively muted, traders should note that repeated rejections at the $68,800–$69,000 zone could reinforce a near-term downtrend, keeping buyers cautious until a clear breakout occurs.  

The MACD reading at -430 indicates persistent bearish momentum, signaling that sellers still exert influence despite the minor pullback. Absence of a signal line limits the precision of crossover interpretations, but the negative value aligns with the price struggling below the 20-period SMA at $69,559. This SMA now serves as a critical resistance, representing the first barrier to an upward reversal. Without regaining this level, upside potential remains capped in the short term.  

Key support lies around $68,575, while immediate resistance is positioned near $68,800 and further up at $69,559. A breakdown below $68,575 could accelerate selling pressure toward $68,200, while a successful push above $68,800 may open the path to test the 20-day SMA. Traders should consider monitoring volume trends closely, as confirmation from increased buying activity will be essential before initiating bullish positions in this tight range.  

For strategy, cautious traders may wait for a decisive break of either side of the current range. Short-term scalpers could target the support-resistance flips within $68,575–$68,800, while swing traders might hold for a clearer trend signal. Risk management is critical given the narrow margin between support and resistance, and the prevailing negative momentum indicated by MACD suggests prioritizing protective stops to mitigate downside exposure.  

The total word count is 272.
